context: Tests comprehensive branch-walking in grill-me: the agent must address every major section of the talk outline, resolve dependencies between decisions (e.g. timing before content), and provide a recommended answer for each question — going beyond the concerns explicitly flagged by the author.

checklist.name: Recommended answer per question
checklist.description: Every numbered question in talk-grill.md is immediately followed by a specific recommendation from the agent (not just a list of questions)

checklist.name: Hook design questioned
checklist.description: talk-grill.md contains at least one question about the hook approach (the provocative claim, the story choice, or audience reaction risk)

checklist.name: Timing/pacing questioned
checklist.description: talk-grill.md contains at least one question about whether the section timings are realistic or well-proportioned

checklist.name: Framework vagueness addressed
checklist.description: talk-grill.md addresses the vague framework section — asks what the decision rubric will actually look like and recommends a concrete structure

checklist.name: Audience calibration questioned
checklist.description: talk-grill.md contains at least one question about audience assumptions (what the mid-level engineers / team leads already know, what they need)

checklist.name: Beyond flagged concerns
checklist.description: talk-grill.md raises at least two questions on topics the author did NOT flag as concerns (discovering new weak spots)

checklist.name: Minimum 7 questions
checklist.description: talk-grill.md contains at least 7 distinct numbered questions

checklist.name: Dependency resolution visible
checklist.description: Questions that depend on each other's answers are ordered so earlier questions resolve dependencies for later ones (e.g. audience analysis before content decisions)

checklist.name: No code/codebase references
checklist.description: talk-grill.md does NOT reference any codebase or suggest reading code to answer questions — stays in the non-code design domain

checklist.name: Takeaway section examined
checklist.description: talk-grill.md contains at least one question about the takeaways / closing section of the talk
